Documentation.short_help: Split dataset into tet volume, then side/node set pairs as a PartitionedDataSetCollection.
Documentation.long_help: Tetrahedra (if any) are extracted first under vtkDataAssembly IOSS/element_blocks/tetrahedra with contiguous GlobalIds (1..N) for IOSS writers. PartitionedDataSetCollection block order is then all node{i} blocks (node_sets), then all side{i} blocks (side_sets), while the Partitioned block names panel lists editable side sets before mirrored node sets. When Partition Point Array Name is set on the extracted boundary vtkPolyData, vtkThreshold with THRESHOLD_BETWEEN (endpoints inclusive in VTK; All Scalars off: any corner qualifies) keeps cells whose first component lies in (-inf, 0]; vtkGeometryFilter and vtkPolyDataConnectivityFilter plus vtkAppendPolyData merge all such connected components into one side/node pair if non-empty. A second vtkThreshold pass (also any corner, BETWEEN) keeps first component in [1, +inf); vtkPolyDataConnectivityFilter splits that sub-mesh into n connected regions, each its own side/node pair. A cell whose corners all lie strictly in (0, 1) may belong to neither pass. Patch order is the merged non-positive patch first (if present), then the n patches at or above 1 (up to n+1 pairs). If the array is missing or the wrong length, or the name is cleared, or both passes yield no cells, the full surface is split with vtkPolyDataNormals (Feature Angle) and vtkPolyDataConnectivityFilter instead. Sort By Area and Custom Post Reorder apply to the full list of patches. Block metadata sets NAME and vtkIOSSReader ENTITY_ID.

StringVectorProperty.name: PartitionPointArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Partition Point Array Name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Point-data array on the boundary: first vtkThreshold first component in (-inf, 0] with THRESHOLD_BETWEEN (inclusive endpoints; any corner), merged to one patch; then [1, +inf) (any corner), split by vtkPolyDataConnectivityFilter into n patches (up to n+1 side/node pairs). Default EndpointIndex. Clear to use Feature angle / vtkPolyDataConnectivityFilter on the full surface only.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FeatureAngle
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Feature angle (deg)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Used when Partition Point Array Name is empty, or the named array is missing / wrong length, or sign-split threshold yields no patches: vtkPolyDataNormals dihedral threshold for cusp / sharp edge split, then vtkPolyDataConnectivityFilter regions. Larger values merge more smooth neighborhoods.

IntVectorProperty.name: SortByArea
IntVectorProperty.label: Sort By Area
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When enabled (default), reorder all node{i} and side{i} patches by total surface area of each side patch, largest first. When disabled, patch order follows the sign-split construction order (merged <=0 region first, then >=1 connectivity regions), or vtkPolyDataConnectivityFilter region indices on the feature-angle fallback path.

IntVectorProperty.name: CustomPostReorder
IntVectorProperty.label: Custom Post Reorder
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When enabled (default), after the current patch order is fixed (e.g. by Sort By Area), move the third patch to the first position and the first patch to the last position. The second patch follows the new first, then the original fourth through (n-1) in order. No effect if there are fewer than three patches.

IntVectorProperty.name: ComputeBoundaryRadialValue
IntVectorProperty.label: Compute Boundary Radial Value
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When enabled, compute BoundaryRadialValue = 1 - x^a on side and node set blocks, and BoundaryRadialValueNormal uses BoundaryRadialValue * sideNormal. When disabled, BoundaryRadialValue is not computed, and BoundaryRadialValueNormal uses sideNormal.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: BoundaryRadialNormalFalloffFactor
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Boundary Radial Normal Falloff Factor (a)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Exponent a in BoundaryRadialValue = 1 - x^a, where x is the raw radial coordinate.

StringVectorProperty.name: BlockNames
StringVectorProperty.label: Block Names

StringVectorProperty.name: BoundaryVariables
StringVectorProperty.label: Boundary Variables
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Newline-separated rows aligned with the Partitioned block names panel order; values in each row are tab-separated Variable1, Variable2, ... entries. Side set rows are used by the filter, and node set rows mirror the corresponding side row in the widget. Non-zero values are written to tetrahedra point-data scalars BoundaryVariable1, BoundaryVariable2, ... Repeated writes to the same volume node are warned and averaged.

StringVectorProperty.name: BoundaryWriteNormals
StringVectorProperty.label: Boundary Write Normals
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Newline-separated 0/1 flags aligned with the Partitioned block names panel order. Only side set rows are used. When non-zero, that side's BoundaryRadialValueNormal is accumulated onto tetrahedra volume points (independent of BoundaryVariables). Repeated writes to the same volume node are warned and averaged.
